summary: Backend API testing for Tazakkur app after 11 feature implementation. 22/23 tests passed. All critical backend features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when video_id doesn't exist in video_lessons (foreign key constraint). Expected behavior - should return 400 with meaningful error message instead of 500.

action_items: Handle FK constraint on /api/admin/quiz/batch gracefully - catch FK violation and return 400 instead of 500
critical_code_review_comments: quiz/submit endpoint updates zikr_count instead of points - may cause leaderboard/points inconsistency if both fields are used
lesson/[id].tsx queries Supabase directly instead of going through backend API - bypasses backend caching/auth logic
manage-quiz.tsx has hardcoded fallback URL 'https://tazakkur-production-c8c9.up.railway.app' which would override env var if EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is empty
server.py is 2000+ lines - should be split into routers/modules

frontend_file_checks._layout.tsx: PASS - 5 tabs: Главная, Уроки, Зикр, Рейтинг, Ещё. Prayers hidden via href:null
frontend_file_checks.colors.ts: PASS - DarkColors export with goldBackground property exists
frontend_file_checks.lesson/[id].tsx: PASS - imports YoutubePlayer from react-native-youtube-iframe, uses it with videoId
frontend_file_checks.manage-quiz.tsx: PASS - proper quiz form with lesson picker, textarea, preview, batch submit

seed_data_creation: Test quiz questions inserted via batch API for lesson 35, and test lessons created/deleted for YouTube URL tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 implemented features verified. Backend APIs working. Frontend file structure correct. The one test failure is a minor error handling issue - FK violation returns 500 instead of 400. Frontend not UI-tested (Expo/RN app, not web browser).
rca_of_issue: FK constraint: quiz_tasks.video_id has a foreign key to video_lessons.id. When non-existent video_id is used, Supabase throws PostgreSQL FK violation. The backend catches this as generic Exception and returns 500. Fix: catch the specific error and return HTTPException(400, ...) before the insert.
